Containers.Name: Unraid CoPilot
Containers.Description: AI assistant for Unraid. Ask natural language questions about your server, docker containers, and system settings.
Containers.Overview:
Unraid CoPilot is an AI-powered assistant designed to help you manage and monitor your Unraid server using natural language.
[b]Features:[/b] - Natural language server management. - Docker container status and control via chat. - System health insights and log analysis. - Integrated dashboard card for quick status checks. - Secure local-first processing options.
